symptoms.symptom_name: Globus (lump-in-throat) sensation with difficulty swallowing saliva

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Globus with preserved swallowing of liquids is typical of functional throat tightness.

symptoms.symptom_name: Patent airway — normal voice, full sentences, swallows water, no stridor

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal voice/speech/swallow and absent stridor strongly exclude acute airway obstruction.

symptoms.symptom_name: No sudden voice change or painful goitre enlargement

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No acute painful enlargement/voice change argues against goitre haemorrhage.

symptoms.symptom_name: Anxiety-triggered onset with neck palpation and hyperventilation; stable longstanding goitre

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hypervigilant neck palpation and hyperventilation strongly support a functional/anxiety globus.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine thyroid ultrasound and TFTs via GP
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Elective monitoring of the goitre; not urgent.
Not indicated with a demonstrably patent airway and no red flags.
